'''âs-t-r-y''' ('''kasatreyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:timetable|timetable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-t-r-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:timetable|timetable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-t-r-y
|-
! Lemma
| kasatreyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisatreyoko|thisatreyoko]] || [[word:jisatreyoko|jisatreyoko]] || [[word:shisatreyoko|shisatreyoko]] || [[word:kisatreyoko|kisatreyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusatreyoko|thuthusatreyoko]] || [[word:jujusatreyoko|jujusatreyoko]] || [[word:shushusatreyoko|shushusatreyoko]] || [[word:kukusatreyoko|kukusatreyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusatreyoko|thusatreyoko]] || [[word:jusatreyoko|jusatreyoko]] || [[word:shusatreyoko|shusatreyoko]] || [[word:kusatreyoko|kusatreyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusatreyoko|thusatreyoko]] || [[word:jusatreyoko|jusatreyoko]] || [[word:shusatreyoko|shusatreyoko]] || [[word:kusatreyoko|kusatreyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesatreyoko|thesatreyoko]] || [[word:jesatreyoko|jesatreyoko]] || [[word:shesatreyoko|shesatreyoko]] || [[word:kesatreyoko|kesatreyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosatreyoko|thothosatreyoko]] || [[word:jojosatreyoko|jojosatreyoko]] || [[word:shoshosatreyoko|shoshosatreyoko]] || [[word:kokosatreyoko|kokosatreyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosatreyoko|thosatreyoko]] || [[word:josatreyoko|josatreyoko]] || [[word:shosatreyoko|shosatreyoko]] || [[word:kosatreyoko|kosatreyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosatreyoko|thosatreyoko]] || [[word:josatreyoko|josatreyoko]] || [[word:shosatreyoko|shosatreyoko]] || [[word:kosatreyoko|kosatreyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚsatreyoko|thĂŚsatreyoko]] || [[word:jĂŚsatreyoko|jĂŚsatreyoko]] || [[word:shĂŚsatreyoko|shĂŚsatreyoko]] || [[word:kĂŚsatreyoko|kĂŚsatreyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasatreyoko|thathasatreyoko]] || [[word:jajasatreyoko|jajasatreyoko]] || [[word:shashasatreyoko|shashasatreyoko]] || [[word:kakasatreyoko|kakasatreyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasatreyoko|thasatreyoko]] || [[word:jasatreyoko|jasatreyoko]] || [[word:shasatreyoko|shasatreyoko]] || [[word:kasatreyoko|kasatreyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasatreyoko|thasatreyoko]] || [[word:jasatreyoko|jasatreyoko]] || [[word:shasatreyoko|shasatreyoko]] || [[word:kasatreyoko|kasatreyoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
